topic: My calendar has a recurring Friday meeting I did not create at an address that no longer exists
title: My Calendar Has a Recurring Friday Meeting I Did Not Create at an Address That No Longer Exists | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My calendar has a weekly meeting every Friday at four PM. I did not create it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen displaying Google Calendar with a recurring weekly meeting block on Friday at four PM, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Google Workspace. Personal account. Two factor authentication.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a home office desk with an open laptop, a coffee mug, late evening lamp light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I check my calendar every morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a calendar app on a smartphone screen showing the morning week view, the cursor on Friday, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First saw it three weeks ago. Recurring. Through twenty thirty.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a calendar event detail view on a laptop screen showing a recurring schedule extending through twenty thirty, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tried to delete it. Permission denied.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a calendar event delete confirmation dialog box on a screen showing a permission denied error, dim screen glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The organizer field was greyed out. No name. No email.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a calendar event detail view with the organizer field greyed out and unreadable, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Opened the event. Read the title.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand on a laptop trackpad clicking into an event detail, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Just an address. Fourteen Oak Lane. Apartment three B. No notes.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a calendar event title field on a screen showing 14 Oak Lane Apartment 3B, no notes or attendees visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Looked it up. That building was demolished in two thousand four.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a search engine results page on a laptop showing news headlines about a building demolished in two thousand four, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Drove there last Friday at four. Empty lot. My phone buzzed at four oh five.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty lot at dusk with weeds and broken concrete, no buildings standing, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Notification said the meeting had started without me.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone notification on a lock screen showing a meeting has started, four oh five PM timestamp visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next Friday's title has changed. It is my home address now.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a calendar event title field on a screen showing the viewer's own home address with the house number prominent, vertical 9:16 framing
